name: Pi Coding Agent — Mock Lemonade e2e
description: Add a sub(a, b) function below add(a, b) in src/main.py. Uses a local OpenAI-compat mock server so the run is fully deterministic and offline.

input.task: Add a `sub(a, b)` function below the existing `add` function in `src/main.py`. Do not modify any other files. When you are done, exit.
